field.title: CRB
field.guid_formula:

    [2a824f50-832f-11f0-94ad-03f77de1684f] / COUNTD([contacts_amo_id_p3zw])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([contacts_amo_id]) > 0 THEN
    [clients_book] / COUNTD([contacts_amo_id])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: Revenue на клиента

ELSE
    NULL
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([contacts_amo_id]) > 0 THEN
    sum([sum_revenue]) / COUNTD([contacts_amo_id])
ELSE

END

field.title: days_of_book
field.guid_formula:
IF [first_date_book_z551] IS NOT NULL THEN
    DATE([first_date_book_z551]) - [first_creation_date_cp69]
END
field.formula:
IF [first_date_book] IS NOT NULL THEN
    DATE([first_date_book]) - [first_creation_date]
END

field.title: Ср. revenue

  ELSE

  END
field.formula:
IF SUM([sum_book]) > 0 THEN
      SUM([sum_revenue]) / SUM([sum_book])
  ELSE
      NULL
  END
